character.definition: a cove; a bay, a bend or nook in the hills, the outside part of a curved bank; the curve of a bow
(ancient form of 旁) side, by the side of; nearby
to bite (said of a dog), dog to take food
clothing and ornaments; an ornamental item; a decorative article of a garment
(Cant.) onomatopoetic, the sound of a gong
a wry mouth; (Cant.) a final particle expressing contradiction, quotation, etc.
name of a river in Henan; Henan
to be circumspect, cautious in one's behaviour (distinguish DKW 30790 gou3)
